title: Eat Yourself!
description: You are lost with no food? Now you can cut yourself to get some meat. Wait.. That's.. cannibalism?
body:
**Eat Yourself!** is a darkly humorous survival mod for Minecraft that lets you take survival into your own hands (literally). When hunger strikes, you can now cut yourself to harvest food, but it comes with serious consequences.

Wiki: https://athlantes.github.io/AthisWiki/

**Features:**

- Self-harvesting mechanic: Shift right click with a knife to cut yourself and get Raw Player Meat. Each cut costs 1 heart, so think carefully before acting.
Cooked Player Meat: Cook your raw meat to restore more hunger and make your risky meal more satisfying.
- Low health warning: If you have 3 hearts or less and try to cut yourself, you will get Nausea, adding a dangerous twist to desperate survival.
- Risk vs reward gameplay: Every decision matters. Are you willing to sacrifice health for food, or wait and risk starvation?
- Dark humor and flavor: For players who enjoy twisted, challenging survival mechanics with a sense of humor.

**Planned updates:**

- New knife types with different effects.
- Additional recipes and buffs/debuffs.
- More ways to interact with other survival mechanics and mods.

**Eat Yourself!** is perfect for players who love challenging, unique, and slightly twisted survival gameplay. Every meal is a choice, every bite comes with a cost, and survival has never been so personal.

Encounter any problems? You can join our Discord Server: https://discord.com/invite/XYvwWhFSXd
